meaning: n.私酒,私运入的劣酒,烈酒
examples: Madam Hooch is the resident Quidditch expert.
Harry, no way! You heard what Madam Hooch said.
Meanwhile, sales of high-end hooch increased by 8%, to 15.4 million cases.
Vintners in the 1870s sold hooch to miners, and again during Prohibition, when bootleggers here ran wine into Los Angeles under the cover of night.
